reviews.author: Jo
reviews.text: A brilliant experience. These coconut boats are comfortable, stable, and navigated expertly by the people you ride with. Unlike when on a kayak, I didn't experience motion sickness or dizziness in the heat (32°c min) I shared one with an 'aunty' who was in charge of the rowing; so skilled! Guests are provided with a traditional hat to wear that are lined with reflective material that keeps you really nice and cool even in the heat of midday sun. The route the tour take is approximately an hour long, and there is a great atmosphere and vibe. You can opt to move over to one of the 'spinny' boats (as it requires the trained rowers to carry out the spin) or just enjoy watching others be spun round at greta speed, it's up to you. There are boats that play music, some boats that take photos which you can purchase at the end of your tour (if you want it), and even boats that guests can join onto for a spot of karaoke. Along the way, my rower handed me a fishing rod to see if we were in luck with any river fish, alas no, but a bit of fun nonetheless. We also paused alongside a fisherman who demonstrated casting out of a fishing net, done in such a way it was almost like a performative dance. A wonderful experience all round. I was a single guest on one boat, and this cost 200,000vnd (£5.60). Booking in advance is not necessary, I was able to turn up and there was no waiting or queues. There was nothing else to pay, though tips are welcome should you wish to show your appreciation for your assigned rower (I did as I appreciate, it does not look like the easiest thing to do, yet they do it with such kindness, smiles and they welcome you on like family). If you have the time, it's a worthwhile and recommended experience.

reviews.author: Rick Jardon
reviews.text: One of those kitschy tourist things that you have to do that was not crowded, very reasonably priced at about $4pp and quite fun. The boat drivers were characters and quite funny. I’m glad we did it. It was about 1 hr. Go around 3-3:30 and then ride through the rice fields afterwards. Maybe stop at the Roving Chillhouse Restaurant and Sunset Bar for a bite/drink at sunset

reviews.author: Gary Gauld
reviews.text: Very fun. Done the tour, the boat trip and a Vietnamese coffee making class which was very fun and interesting. Lucky for me it was a beautiful day when I went. Highly recommend this trip for something fun during the day and not too far away, we actually got there by bicycle.

reviews.author: sonia juif
reviews.text: The whole coconut boat trip we have gone through is amazing. We took a tour with HAI and he’s a very good entertainer. The price is more than reasonable, we get much more than what we paid. We wait not even 5 mins and the boat ride distance is much longer than we expected.

reviews.author: BaconPG Teoh
reviews.text: This is the place to go if you want to get away from the main haggling and loud touristy spot. Was a chill nice ride with some simple activities. Linh the aunty manning my coconut boat was kind. I wish I’ve spoken Vietnamese so I could talk to her more.

reviews.author: Anuran Gogoi
reviews.text: The Bay Mau Coconut Forest is a unique and refreshing escape just outside Hoi An. The basket boat ride through the lush waterways is fun and memorable, with friendly local guides showing off their skills and sharing stories. It’s a great way to experience the area’s natural beauty and traditional fishing culture. It can get a bit crowded during peak hours, but overall it’s a charming and worthwhile experience.

reviews.author: Kat C
reviews.text: Really enjoyed the coconut boat ride! Trung was a fantastic guide and very friendly. Made us feel safe and also made us origami from coconut leaves. Paid VND 100,000 for a very memorable 45min boat ride!

reviews.author: Thomas Sluciak
reviews.text: The boat tour was a lot of fun! Oanh was our guide and she took us to some beautiful spots and helped us get some really beautiful photos. Highly recommend the boat tour if you're in Hoi An

reviews.author: Gadis Fitri Syabilla
reviews.text: Veryyyy fun experience!! Worth 200k for 2 people and no additional cost for turning attraction🤣🤣 Thank you to aunty Oanh for taking us sight seeing Mekong River, Fishing, Making us a ring from coconut leafs and allow us to ride the boat as well. Would like to recommend this experience to the other travelers too!

reviews.author: Piyu T
reviews.text: AN Mÿ rest stop Cuong is the best rider. He entertains well and good person. 100,000 P/P. We went early in the morning and had a very peaceful boat ride.🛶

reviews.author: Alex Hebert
reviews.text: Thank you to Hai, our guide! This event is an absolute must if you’re visiting Hoi An! I won’t spoil what happens so you can be surprised but it’s definitely worth the experience! Just contact them on WhatsApp to set it up

reviews.author: T. Evelyn
reviews.text: We chose this coconut boat ride after reading great reviews about their transparent pricing (unlike some other providers), and it absolutely did not disappoint. From start to finish, everything was clear, honest, and well organized. We had so much fun—especially the spinning, which was a real highlight and had us laughing the whole time! A special shout-out to Mr. Dong, our boat guide, who took amazing care of us. His friendly attitude, great service, and attention to detail made the entire experience even more enjoyable. Highly recommend this coconut boat ride for anyone looking for fun, great service, and no hidden costs!

reviews.author: Theo Hamilton
reviews.text: Great place for a coconut basket boat, they have set prices of 100,000 per person so you wont get scammed. Also they make you some grass jewelry and show you some crab fishing. All in all its about an hour tour including everything. Our tour guide Linh was excellent and very fun on the water.

reviews.author: Laura Sweeney
reviews.text: Took the chance this was still open due to flooding the last couple of days and it was! Trung was great and took us through the coconut groves to the river which was flowing so fast. The spinning in the boat was such fun. Trung made us a couple of rings and grasshoppers out of coconut leaves. Don’t miss out on the Coconut coffee afterwards, it’s the best ever!

reviews.author: Tham Vo
reviews.text: We went on the Coconut Basket boat today from Tom’s Coconut Basket Boat Tour and had Mai and Linh as the boat rowers. Both were very lovely people. The host was Tim who explained what you get before you had to pay for it. Would recommend doing this activity with the kids! It included creating little bamboo rose rings and fishing for little crabs. And if you’re daring, you can ask for the fast spinning on the boat. My kids love it! 👌 Prices was very reasonable too.

reviews.author: Bijin Kumar S
reviews.text: A great service by Thoung Hai in the coconut boat ride in Hoi An. Lovely person took great clicks and very welcoming by singing Psy's Gangnam Style.

reviews.author: Pavel A
reviews.text: Linh absolutely blew me away with her incredible service and expertise! My experience was truly exceptional thanks to her! ✨🥳😍 The cafe staff nearby overwhelmed us with their hospitality.

reviews.author: GAN LAY YONG
reviews.text: We glide through the Coconut Forest in a bamboo basket boat. Was really exciting when the boat man starts to spin the boat. We were then led to the live concert area where the performer sang and serenade us. He too danced to perfection. We also witness a boat man casting a fishing net.

reviews.author: Karina Ria Elloso
reviews.text: This was a bit overhyped on TikTok. The ride lasts 40 minutes. It was boring for me. There’s not much to do except ride. They can spin you around, but you’ll need to pay extra. I also didn’t like the smell haha someone was doing karaoke in the middle. You’ll stop in front and won’t leave until you give a tip. Lol for me, it’s okay to skip this area.

reviews.author: Kiera Newbegin
reviews.text: We had heard really positive things about this company being transparent with pricing and not over charging so decided to go with them. We didn’t make a booking I just messaged their WhatsApp in advance. They informed us if arriving by grab bikes to head to Annica Villa to avoid being taken to the wrong shop. Once we had arrived we had the most peaceful and enjoyable 1 hour coconut boat ride with Cuong. He showed us how they manoeuvre the boats along with making us cool headbands & rings out of the coconut leaves. We paid 200K for two people on one boat which also included the boat spinning. I highly recommend this company if you’re wanting the coconut boat experience without the crowds and scammers!

reviews.author: Nick
reviews.text: The service I received was not at all like what was advertised. The images and information on their website and promotional maps created a very appealing image of the business, but when I visited in person, I felt deceived. The service quality did not meet expectations, and it seemed like they were using misleading information to attract customers. I hope the owner will reconsider their business practices. Instead of relying on misleading "maps" or advertising strategies to attract customers, focus on providing quality, transparent, and fair services. Only then can the business grow sustainably and earn the trust of its customers.

reviews.author: L. C.
reviews.text: Tour with Oanh was great. She is calm and very kind. No crazy turns, which I appreciate 🥰

reviews.author: Julie Fernandes
reviews.text: Our guide was Hai and he was absolutely amazing and hilarious. He took amazing pictures and built us cool souvenirs out of coconut husk. He was so meticulous and I hope everyone gets a ride with him!!!

reviews.author: Feli Sch
reviews.text: Really great boat tour. It also included a free Nanh Xeo cooking class and they were really delicious!!!

reviews.author: Neil Cox
reviews.text: The boat ride was brilliant! Our rower Linh was funny but safe and she made a flower and insect from a coconut palm frond. The scenery was lovely too. Very cool!

reviews.author: Juna G
reviews.text: Cuong gave us the best coconut boat ride experience! He was so friendly and we honestly had a party on the boat. Very talented too, making us hand made flowers and gifting them to us. Also got to experience spinning around on the boat, which was lots of fun. Cuong played music for us and really made our experience great!!!

reviews.author: philip holland
reviews.text: We got a grab to the The Basket Boat Cafe & Restaurant and picked up coconut boats from there. Very easy and ignored all the other vendor. All they ask is to have a drink before or after the boat.

reviews.author: Jason Pham
reviews.text: Trung is a wonderful charismatic person. Funny and kind hearted, I absolutely love his attitude. Coconut boat ride and spin was an amazing experience. I highly recommend Trung and his team to anyone. Very very affordable and friendly staff.

reviews.author: Bappi Sarkar
reviews.text: Very good place to visit. And the guide for us Trung, is a very energetic guy with lot of experience and have a joyful ride with him. Came here to enjoy the ride on a spinning boat. Love the place and the experience…

reviews.author: Rose Favre
reviews.text: Excellent! Went for a boat ride in the morning and were the only boat out on the river! Super peaceful and calm. It was hot but Trung our guide provided hats and a large umbrella to shield us from the sun. Trung even serenaded us with a Vietnamese song as we floated down river. Definitely recommend :)
